mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, storage_root_id, file_item_id, permission, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM user_storage_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, storage_root_id, file_item_id, permission, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM user_storage_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND storage_root_id = #{storageRootId} AND file_item_id IS NULL LIMIT 1
